trivia_bullets.text: Released September 27, 2024 in Duskmourn: House of Horror (DSK), a top-down horror set set entirely within a single colossal haunted mansion ruled by the demonic Valgavoth. Set mechanical identity centers on enchantments, with Horror creatures often carrying the Enchantment supertype.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Top of the Duskmourning Part 1

trivia_bullets.text: Typed Enchantment Creature — Horror. Mark Rosewater noted enchantment creatures were the low-hanging fruit to raise enchantment as-fan in DSK, particularly creatures with ephemeral, environment-influencing qualities. Art by Bartek Fedyczak, Polish illustrator with 38+ MTG credits across Duskmourn, Warhammer 40K, and Star Wars.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Top of the Duskmourning Part 1

trivia_bullets.text: "It moves with the speed of a spider but none of its skittering grace, scuttling to the sound of mucus-covered fingers." No named speaker — omniscient dread narration consistent with DSK's horror-film pastiche voice.
Flash plus surveil 1 on attack. EDHREC rank 13,660 — modest Commander uptake, primarily in graveyard and Enchantress shells wanting incidental surveil.

related_cards.note: Same set, same black Horror creature archetype

related_cards.name: Fear of Missing Out

related_cards.name: Valgavoth, Harrower of Souls
related_cards.note: The demonic entity whose Harrowings birth new horrors like this amalgam
